questionHtml: Based on their structure, the insect and bat wings are analogous. Outline what is meant by an analogous trait.
markschemeHtml:
a. analogous traits have a different evolutionary history/ancestry ✔

b. different structures are adaptations for flight ✔

c. selective pressure leads to a similar solution to the problem of flying ✔

meta.title: Based on their structure, the insect and bat wings are analogous. Outline what is meant by an analogous trait.
